title: Meshcore to Discord Bride using node JS and a raspberry pi

messages.author: Jude
messages.text: https://github.com/Hude06/MeshCoreDiscordBridge This is a simple NODE JS script that uses a serial connection to a node that has the USB version flashed to it. Then it will be able to read and write to the node from messages sent from the discord. I was having some issues with python so I went back to trusty old JS
messages.content_html: https://github.com/Hude06/MeshCoreDiscordBridge This is a simple NODE JS script that uses a serial connection to a node that has the USB version flashed to it. Then it will be able to read and write to the node from messages sent from the discord. I was having some issues with python so I went back to trusty old JS

messages.author: Jude
messages.text: Some things I want to work on. Let me know other things you guys want to see Use Discord Nickname instead of username Switch back to !send commands or maybe just keep both Add command prefix for over the mesh. So mesh -> discord prefix would be ! for one node but for a different node it could be $. This would be defined in the json file. Update docs for new commands and simplify docs Add Trace Routing from discord. !trace “node name” returns trace in discord Add the packet path in discord. Noname1854: “Hey” Path AA, AB, AC -
messages.content_html:
Some things I want to work on. Let me know other things you guys want to see
  • Use Discord Nickname instead of username
  • Switch back to !send commands or maybe just keep both
  • Add command prefix for over the mesh. So mesh -> discord prefix would be ! for one node but for a different node it could be $. This would be defined in the json file.
  • Update docs for new commands and simplify docs
  • Add Trace Routing from discord. !trace “node name” returns trace in discord
  • Add the packet path in discord. Noname1854: “Hey” Path AA, AB, AC
-
messages.reactions_html: 1

messages.author: Jude
messages.text: I’ve just released v1.1 of the Meshcore → Discord Bridge. If you’re running a bridge, please pull the update and review the changes. Repo: https://github.com/Hude06/MeshCoreDiscordBridge/tree/main Ping me if you run into issues or have questions.
